zh.Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenla: 奧地利布爾根蘭州希德爾 阿姆 希福勞吉陳
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Sicile於1310年出生在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫時，她的父親Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile38歲，母親Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile27歲。她於1328年6月27日與Stephen II Duke of Bavaria在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 明陳結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1349年3月21日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 藍書特享年39歲，埋葬在奧地利布爾根蘭州希德爾 阿姆 希福勞吉陳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Sicile于1310年出生在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫时，她的父亲Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile38岁，母亲Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile27岁。她于1328年6月27日与Stephen II Duke of Bavaria在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 明陳结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1349年3月21日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 藍書特享年39岁，埋葬在奥地利布爾根蘭州希德爾 阿姆 希福勞吉陳。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sicile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sickel
meanings: North German: nickname from Middle Low German sickel ‘kid, young goat’.
Americanized form of German   Seckel  . Compare   Van Sickel   2.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Sicile was born in 1310, in Palermo, Palermo, Sicily, Italy, her father, Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile, was 38 and her mother, Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile, was 27. She married Stephen II Duke of Bavaria on 27 June 1328, in München, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 21 March 1349, in Landshut, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 39, and was buried in Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenland, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Sicile est née en 1310, à Palermo, Palermo, Sicile, Italie, son père, Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen II Duke of Bavaria le 27 juin 1328, à Landkreis München, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 mars 1349, à Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenland, Autriche.

de.Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenla: Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenland, Österreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Sicile 1310 in Palermo, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile 38 und ihre Mutter Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile 27. Sie hat am 27. Juni 1328 in Landkreis München, Bayern, Deutschland Stephen II Duke of Bavaria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 21. März 1349 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenland, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Sicile è nata il nel 1310 nel Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, sua padre, Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Stephen II Duke of Bavaria il 27 giugno 1328, nel Landkreis München, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 21 marzo 1349, nel Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenland, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Sicileが1310年にイタリアシシリアプアラーモプアラーモで生まれた時，父Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicileは38歳，母Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicileは27歳であった。1328年6月27日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ムuンチェンでStephen II Duke of Bavariaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1349年3月21日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ランドシュトで39歳で死去し，オーストリアブルジェンランドネウシエドル アム セフラウエンキルチェンにて埋葬された。

ko.Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenla: 오스트리아 버겐랜드 니우시드 아 시 프라커천
ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Sicile(이)가 1310년 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 파일모에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1328년 6월 27일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 u천에서 Stephen II Duke of Bavaria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 3월 21일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 랜드슈트에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 버겐랜드 니우시드 아 시 프라커천에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Sicile nasceu em 1310, em Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Itália, seu pai, Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen II Duke of Bavaria em 27 de junho de 1328, em Landkreis München, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 21 de março de 1349, em Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Alemanha, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenland, Áustria.

ru.Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenla: фрауенкирчэн, неусиедл ам си, бурдженланд, Австрия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Sicile родилась в 1310 г. в местности пеилирмо, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия, её отцу по имени Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen II Duke of Bavaria 27 июня 1328 г. в местности ландкрис мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 21 марта 1349 г. в местности ландкрис ландшут, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности фрауенкирчэн, неусиедл ам си, бурдженланд, Австрия.

es.Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenla: Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenland, Austria
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Sicile nació en 1310, en Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, su papá, Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Stephen II Duke of Bavaria el 27 de junio de 1328, en Landkreis München, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1349, en Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Frauenkirchen, Neusiedl am See, Burgenland, Austria.
